calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Off Calendar

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Jhovani A. Reyes and Claudia D. Ramos; father and mother of minor.
Petitioner Amalia Alexandra Reyes sworn and examined through Spanish Interpreter Stephanie Chiquillo.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Amalia Alexandra Reyes to Amalia Alexandra Reyes Ramos.
The court also grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Alexander Yadiel Reyes to Alexander Yadiel Reyes Ramos.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Reset To May-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
